homepage.title: Ficep Group | World Leader in CNC Machines Production
homepage.description: The world's largest manufacturer of automatic steel processing equipment and machinery for the forging and stamping industry
homepage.text_excerpt:
Ficep Group | World Leader in CNC Machines Production
Skip to content
Contact us
Find a machine
Almost a century of experience, forging our way into the future
We have become the largest producer in the world today of automated systems for the fabrication of structural steel, plate and an outstanding producer of equipment for the forging industry.
Find more
Ficep Group
For over nine decades, the name Ficep has been synonymous with an international and worldwide presence, with a wide network of subsidiaries and agencies.
Easy search
Take advantage of our research system which will guide you step by step in identifying the best product to satisfy your needs.
Quick support
Get in contact with our skilled personnel who will be able to understand your production needs.
We effectively serve our clients thanks to
innovation, continuous development and attention
to customer applications
Steel fabrication machinery
Stand-alone machines and fully automatic lines for the processing of structural steel  from the raw material to the finished piece.
Forging machinery
Complete and automatic lines to forge and cut steel, brass, aluminum, titanium, and more.
We offer a wide range of high-technology and innovative machinery
to satisfy the worldwide industries
and supporting you in optimizing your production process.
Solutions for
Service centers
Solutions for
Agricultural & Earth moving equipment
Solutions for

Solutions for
